channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Cars About to Get More Expensive? This Startup Wants to Make Your Services Cheaper
item.description: Sparq Diagnostics, a startup founded by Codrin Cobzaru and Daniel Nieh, has developed a plug-in scanner designed for everyday drivers. The device translates the insights of an OBD-II scanner into a user-friendly app, presenting information through digestible tools and metrics.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
